programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: A hit-and-run incident throws Detroit booters off their beat; a son tries to recover a car impounded after his father was caught speeding without a license in Philadelphia; Ponytail tries to enforce a special ordinance on the Fourth of July.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Philadelphia ticket writer Jeff gets promoted to supervisor; Jeff must go to the rescue of his new squad, which includes rookie Denise and Gina, a magnet for male attention.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: A frustrated man with a long list of excuses tests Yolanda's patience at the impound lot; supervisor Eula rescues Brian from an angry woman disputing her ticket on Cinco de Mayo; Mike struggles to communicate with African brothers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Garfield and Sherry need police backup when a furious man tries to remove a boot; a man blocking a bus zone tests ticket-writer Shawn's communication skills; a creative father and son try to retrieve their impounded car.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Long-haired DeAndre, nicknamed "Ponytail," confronts an irate citizen over parking on city property in Detroit; Michele and Sonjia, the "Super Boot Crew," boot a widow whose husband may have racked up tickets on their car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: A blizzard dumps 10 inches of snow on Philadelphia and adds to the aggravation at the impound lot; winter weather causes problems for booters Garfield and Sherry.

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The buyers compete with a swarm of bidders; power tools and antique clocks await the winners.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Ricky and Bubba's nemesis resurfaces in the city of Mesquite; Jenny and Mary uncover a Cold War relic; a struggling Victor searches for bargains.

programme.sub-title: Black, White and Hotrod All Over
programme.desc: A customer wants a paint job to match his wicked 1959 Anglia dragster; Shannon and Ryan are building a custom Harley-Davidson bagger for a client using a repurposed police bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan applies his painting skills on a '67 Firebird; a one-of-a-kind local car collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan is asked to paint a Harley trike in the spirit of Van Gogh's "Starry Night"; Kevin finds a car that might be one of the most valuable ones Danny has ever seen, if it's an original.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny gets a '62 Caddy which he hopes will be a huge flip; Ryan hatches a secret plan for the car behind Danny's back; Danny and Ryan visit a world-class dune buggy collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.sub-title: Chrome Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Danny attempts to get the derailed '62 Caddy project back on track; Ryan tries to make up for a mishap by finding a flip or two for the shop.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.sub-title: You Never Forget Your First Z28, Part 1
programme.desc: Danny is asked to find and build a 1979 Camaro Z28; one is found online, but the car is not in good condition and the project turns into a nightmare; another client asks Ryan to trick out four high-end computer towers, in just three days.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.sub-title: You Never Forget Your First Z28, Part 2
programme.desc: Danny's fight with a nightmare Z28 continues, as he puts it though endless fabrication to bring it back to life; Danny visits Steve Barton's world-class car collection; Danny finds it was worth the trouble when the client comes to pick up his Z28.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny finally finds a Plymouth Roadrunner and he's doing it up exactly as he wants to; Mike starts a side project that is as scary as it is silly.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny loses his cool when he sees his golf cart covered in dirt and Horny Mike's stuff; Kevin tries to make Danny happy and teaches Mike a lesson.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny challenges the guys to come up with innovative money-making ideas for the shop; Shannon suggest building a bike from parts picked up at a swap meet; Danny and Kevin go to an auction in Palm Springs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: While Danny is eager to flip a 1974 Ford F100 for a big pay off, he falls in love with it instead; Ryan and Mike meet someone with a couple of 1956 Chevys.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny gets a 1967 Mustang that he hopes he can turn into another Count's Kustoms masterpiece; Shannon and Roli meet a classic couple and their classic 50s Chevys.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has bought a replacement for his beloved dune buggy, Sparkles; Mike talks Ryan into taking it for a quick joy ride that ends up anything but joyful; Danny visits a collection with a patriotic 1962 Corvette he falls in love with.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny plans to put the Count's Kustoms touch on a classic Harley Davidson; Danny finds a rare Mercury that he knows nothing about, but he loves it so much that he starts bidding anyway.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.sub-title: Run It Like You Brung It
programme.desc: Mike gives all the guys their own drifter trikes, but they have to customize them, then race them at the local track; Danny finds a property full of funeral cars, he finds himself in hearse heaven.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Musician DJ Ashba arrives in a 2004 Lamborghini Murciélago that he wants turned into the ultimate "man car," but Danny must make sure to include something special for DJ's wife; Ryan and Paulie hit the streets to score a classic Corvette.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny gets started on flipping a 1971 Chevy C10 Pickup for a profit, then a snafu in the paint department threatens to blow the budget sky high; Danny's band mate, Stoney, gets in a fender bender.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny continues his love affair with El Caminos by flipping a 1975 beauty; the crew members must set aside their differences to help Danny turn a profit; Danny seeks inspiration from Wayne Newton who has a car collection that stuns even The Count.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and the team take on a 1967 Cadillac for a high-end client; musician Jeff Blando stops by the shop to get the finishing touch on a chopper that Danny built for him years ago; Ryan and Roli spot a Buick Skylark with a Hollywood history.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny hopes to impress with an evil twist on a classic Cadillac for a high-rolling client; Ryan discovers that smaller jobs aren't always easier as he works on a high-tech Lego car.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The team is commissioned to restore a 1941 Triumph motorcycle back to its World War II-era glory; even with a $50,000 budget, the project turns into a big challenge; Danny tricks out a friend's Denali and visits a mind-blowing car collection.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and his crew continue to piece together a World War II-era Triumph motorcycle for a client, hoping to make it a tribute to his family's military roots, but when they finally get it all together and try to crank it, it won't start.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny must do a full bumper-to-bumper restoration on a '66 Mustang convertible, but after stripping it down, he finds very little car between her bumpers; Danny must to decide between asking for more money or losing a bunch of his own.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and the team continue wrestling with a stock restoration Mustang mess, hoping for extra funds and a lot of patience from their client; Kevin spots a rare old Grand Prix and Danny visits a world-class specialist, looking for ideas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan goes down the Cadillac customization wormhole, and everyone is happy to watch him go, just to see how the project turns out; Danny is inspired to go check out an amazing Cadillac collection; Mike and Paulie try to buy a rare old Camaro.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Shannon recruits the guys to help him finish up a gift for Danny, a bike he started building for him 10 years ago; Danny spots a 1969 Corvette in a friend's lot and can't resist paying a visit. Ryan buys a sweet Baja Bug.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: The Wahlbergs attend the grand opening of a new Wahlburgers in Toronto; Johnny Drama is asked to star in an independent film.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul and his children visit Mark and his family in Los Angeles; a friendly game of touch football turns competitive; Kari gets Alma to open up about her life in Hollywood.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Things get feisty when members of Mark's entourage pitch ideas for new business ventures; Alma goes shopping for a dress to wear to an upcoming graduation.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Mark grabs some high-tech audio gear and plays Cyrano de Bergerac when Big A goes on a lunch date; Paul's children are challenged to create a burger of the month.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: The NKOTB concert tour intersects with Mark's publicity tour in New York City, creating a chance for the famous Wahlberg brothers to finally share a moment; Paul escorts Alma to a special Mother's Day event featuring celebrity mothers.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul must make a decision about a Wahlburger's poutine; Donnie arrives to help Paul; Mark gets a visit from his older brother, Bob.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: The highly-anticipated opening of a Wahlburgers in Coney Island is delayed; Donnie, Mark and Paul celebrate at the amusement park while battling each other for arcade-game supremacy.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul works to create a burger for New England Patriots owner Robert Kraft, but football players Rob Gronkowski and Julian Edelman offer up a different suggestion; Bob tries to get his daughter to spend quality time with Alma.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Donnie surprises Alma and the rest of the New Kids on the Block parents with a party bus for their Boston concert; Paul flies to Los Angeles to meet a billionaire investor looking to open up Wahlburgers throughout the Middle East.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul visits Mark in France, where he tours Paris and gets the opportunity to prove that his cooking skills are as good as those of any French chef.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Prankster Mark gets a taste of his own medicine when he plays golf against Masters champion Bubba Watson; Alma, Bob and Brandon visit a hospital where Alma worked as a nurse.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Mark travels to Philadelphia to host the Festival of Families celebration honoring Pope Francis; Brandon gets his first chance to join the poker game at the Wahlberg family reunion.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Champion racer Dale Earnhardt Jr. invites Mark to a NASCAR event in New Hampshire; Paul and Bob deliver Wahlburgers to NASCAR drivers Greg Biffle and Ricky Stenhouse Jr.; Brandon flies out to Chicago for a singing lesson with Donnie.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Donnie needs a hand after he promises to bring Wahlburgers to his "Blue Bloods" co-star Marisa Ramirez and the rest of the TV series' cast and crew; Mark sends Paul to Costa Rica for a much-needed vacation.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: While in Orlando, Fla., for the grand opening of the first Wahlburgers in the Sunshine State, Mark and Paul manage to squeeze in a competitive game of mini golf; Alma seeks Donnie's advice after she gets cast in a furniture store commercial.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Donnie and Bob become carried away with campaigning when a poll of Wahlburgers customers asks them to vote for whom they believe is Alma's favorite son; Mark and golfer Bubba Watson team up to compete in the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro Am.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul visits the new Wahlburgers location in Los Angeles and cooks a special meal for Mark and his wife, Rhea, at the restaurant where they first saw each another; Donnie invites Alma to do a Mother's Day interview with Entertainment Tonight.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Mark forces Paul to hire his friend, an outspoken hibachi chef known as Sexy Kenny; Donnie shares his special bartending knowledge with Alma.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Mark invites the brothers and their children to the New England Patriots' practice facility for a game of touch football in front of the team's owner, Robert Kraft; Donnie takes Elijah, an avid drummer, to visit the Zildjian cymbal factory.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul heads to Kentucky to be a featured chef at the prestigious Taste of Derby, while his brothers tag along to play the ponies; Mark visits the headquarters of Nike to develop a Wahlburgers shoe.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul meets with a top-level advertising agency in Chicago that has developed some of Donnie's ideas for a print campaign; while in Las Vegas for a charity event, Mark checks in on the progress of the new Wahlburgers location.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul, Bob and Alma visit the old house Alma and some of the children moved into following her divorce; Brandon works on a Wahlburgers calendar for Alma featuring Donnie and the rest of the family.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.sub-title: Take Me Out to the Paul Game
programme.desc: Paul organizes a burger-eating contest at the Coney Island Wahlburgers to coincide with Donnie throwing out the ceremonial first pitch at a Brooklyn Cyclones baseball game; Bob's daughter asks him about their family heritage for a school project.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Donnie takes Bob and Oscar to scout a potential Wahlburgers location in St. Charles, Ill., and pulls out all the stops to convince Oscar to make Chicago his college town; Mark flies to Toronto for the premiere of his film "Deepwater Horizon.".

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael shares her tips for making a delicious, authentic lasagna; she uses egg pasta and guanciale and layers it with marinara and béchamel sauce.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a flavorful Korean-style taco with a spicy, soy-based recipe that combines salty and sweet ingredients.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to prepare her sister's favorite meal, a chili recipe made with black beans, chopped meat, spices and topped with a blend of cheeses.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael celebrates the Italian flag by making three different pastas in all three of its colors; She breaks down the steps to make a delicious cacio e pepe with copious amounts of cheese and a pesto pasta with toasted Sicilian.

programme.title: Cookie Cupcake Cake
programme.desc: Hosts Buddy Valastro and Samantha Seneviratne vow to find the one; the bakers say yes to wedding cookies and honeymoon-inspired cupcakes.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Mediterranean Charred Chicken Salad With Scallion Pesto
programme.desc: Rachael shows a new take on traditional pesto sauce with a base of herbs and charred onions, that pairs with a Mediterranean chicken salad.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Sweet Onion Burgers With Blue Cheese and Special Sauce
programme.desc: Rachael cooks plant-based burgers; sautéed onions and a blue cheese sauce top the flavorful patties.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael shares her tips for making a delicious, authentic lasagna; she uses egg pasta and guanciale and layers it with marinara and béchamel sauce.
